title: Sqrt(x)
description:
Given a non-negative integer `x`, return the **square root of `x` rounded down**
to the nearest integer. You must not use any built-in exponent or square-root
function.

solutions.summary: Search for the largest integer whose square does not exceed `x`.

steps.title: Handle the tiny cases and set bounds
steps.explanation: For `x < 2` the answer is `x` itself; otherwise search between `1` and `x / 2`.

steps.title: Binary search the answer
steps.explanation: Compare `mid * mid` to `x`, narrowing the range; when it ends, `hi` is the floor of the root.
